narratives.narrative: Threat actor CDB-APT-28 has been observed in 4 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1204.002, T1071, T1190, T1059, T1203. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-APT-22 has been observed in 4 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1059, T1203, T1555, T1486, T1542. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

actions.detail: Isolate systems affected by WORKSPACE ONE UEM

findings.recommendation: Migrate to ML-KEM (CRYSTALS-Kyber) for key exchange

stix_transport.note: TLS 1.3 uses ECDHE — quantum vulnerable for key exchange

jwt_tokens.note: Symmetric crypto — quantum resistant (Grover halves keyspace)

S9_Quantum.recommendation: Begin hybrid key exchange deployment. Inventory all RSA/ECDSA usage for PQC migration.
